question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Houston Rockets and Memphis Grizzlies on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Houston Rockets (43-29) at Memphis Grizzlies (24-48). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: Houston Rockets are a mid-pace offensive team averaging around 112-114 points per game this season, while Memphis Grizzlies have been struggling at 24-48 but still play at a reasonable pace. The Rockets tend to play moderately paced games with solid defense. Memphis, despite their poor record, still averages around 110-112 points. Combining typical outputs: Rockets ~115, Grizzlies ~111 gives roughly 226 total. NBA games this season average around 220-230 total points. Both teams are neither extreme pace nor extreme defensive teams, so a combined total near 226 seems reasonable. Confidence intervals account for variance in pace, shooting efficiency, and game flow.
